Primary Material

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Small stature intramedullary nailing system designed for patients with smaller bone anatomy. Comprehensive catalogue of nail sizes for femoral, tibial, and humeral fractures. Titanium alloy construction with precise interlocking options. Anatomically contoured for optimal fit in smaller medullary canals.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the SS Small Stature Nailing System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The SS Small Stature Nailing System is constructed using Titanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
